name: acgm-codex
description: Long-horizon coding drift control and local governance audit for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Control long-horizon coding drift in Codex.
interface.longDescription: ACGM for Codex provides local-first session grounding, truth-first checks, governance bootstrap, and privacy-minimized activity reporting for long-horizon coding projects.
interface.defaultPrompt: Audit this Codex project for governance readiness and explain the next safe action.
